record.field: Công ty TM Đường Miền Trung

field.name: order_line
field.eval: [(0, 0, { 'product_id': ref('demo_sugar_product_rs'), 'name': 'Đường RS — hợp đồng 1.000 tấn', 'product_uom_qty': 1000, 'product_uom_id': ref('uom.product_uom_unit'), 'price_unit': 17000000, })]

field.name: delivery_schedule_line_ids
field.eval: [ (0, 0, {'product_id': ref('demo_sugar_product_rs'), 'product_uom_id': ref('uom.product_uom_unit'), 'planned_qty': 300, 'planned_date': (datetime.date.today() + relativedelta(days=10)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), 'note': 'Đợt 1'}), (0, 0, {'product_id': ref('demo_sugar_product_rs'), 'product_uom_id': ref('uom.product_uom_unit'), 'planned_qty': 300, 'planned_date': (datetime.date.today() + relativedelta(days=25)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), 'note': 'Đợt 2'}), (0, 0, {'product_id': ref('demo_sugar_product_rs'), 'product_uom_id': ref('uom.product_uom_unit'), 'planned_qty': 200, 'planned_date': (datetime.date.today() + relativedelta(days=40)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), 'note': 'Đợt 3'}), (0, 0, {'product_id': ref('demo_sugar_product_rs'), 'product_uom_id': ref('uom.product_uom_unit'), 'planned_qty': 200, 'planned_date': (datetime.date.today() + relativedelta(days=55)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), 'note': 'Đợt 4'}), ]
